nasb.text: and all the firstborn males by the number of names from a month old and upward, for their numbered men were 22,273.

esv.text: And all the firstborn males, according to the number of names, from a month old and upward as listed were 22,273.

cnv.text: 根據人名的數目，一個月及以上，凡是頭生的男子，被數點的，共有二萬二千二百七十三個。

ccb.text: 年龄在一个月以上的共两万二千二百七十三人。
